introSection: Flash is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Lewa Adventure in Jingyang, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China. Along with Full Throttle and Hyper Coaster, Flash holds the record for the tallest vertical loop at a height of. The vertical loop also wraps around the lift hill.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride's track and supports arrived at the park in late 2014 and early 2015. The roller coaster was topped off in mid-August with the trains arriving shortly after.

Flash opened in January 2016.

fullText:
Flash is a steel hyper roller coaster located at Lewa Adventure in Jingyang, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China. Along with Full Throttle and Hyper Coaster, Flash holds the record for the tallest vertical loop at a height of. The vertical loop also wraps around the lift hill.

The ride's track and supports arrived at the park in late 2014 and early 2015. The roller coaster was topped off in mid-August with the trains arriving shortly after.

Flash opened in January 2016.

Red track with yellow supports.

The trains have lap-bar restraints.
